title: High-entropy alloy enables multi-path electron synergism and lattice oxygen activation for enhanced oxygen evolution activity

跨学科关系.relation: facilitates effective activation at Ni-Co dual-site
跨学科关系.evidence: the integration of weaker Co-O bonds enabling effective LOM at the Ni-Co dual-site through synergistic multi-path electron transfer

跨学科关系.evidence: design of a NiFeCoCrW0.2 HEA that exhibits improved activity, achieving an overpotential of 220 mV at 10 mA cm-2
